query: INSERT INTO diagnosticQuestions (assessmentId, questionText, options, correctAnswer, skillArea) SELECT id, 'Which of the following is a complete sentence?', JSON_ARRAY('A) Running through the park', 'B) The dog ran through the park', 'C) While running through the park', 'D) Running and jumping'), 'B', 'Grammar' FROM diagnosticAssessments WHERE title = 'RLA Diagnostic Assessment' UNION ALL SELECT id, 'What is the main idea of the passage?', JSON_ARRAY('A) The history of technology', 'B) How smartphones changed communication', 'C) The future of the internet', 'D) Different types of phones'), 'B', 'Reading Comprehension' FROM diagnosticAssessments WHERE title = 'RLA Diagnostic Assessment' UNION ALL SELECT id, 'Which word is spelled correctly?', JSON_ARRAY('A) Occassion', 'B) Occassion', 'C) Occasion', 'D) Ocassion'), 'C', 'Spelling' FROM diagnosticAssessments WHERE title = 'RLA Diagnostic Assessment' UNION ALL SELECT id, 'Choose the sentence with correct punctuation', JSON_ARRAY('A) She said, "I will be there soon."', 'B) She said "I will be there soon".', 'C) She said, "I will be there soon.', 'D) She said I will be there soon.'), 'A', 'Punctuation' FROM diagnosticAssessments WHERE title = 'RLA Diagnostic Assessment';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2KiCrCqNDFcXt7P.577d1a63eeb5 --database P2Dpw9MQsmxzdUQCfGjV6b --execute INSERT INTO diagnosticQuestions (assessmentId, questionText, options, correctAnswer, skillArea) SELECT id, 'Which of the following is a complete sentence?', JSON_ARRAY('A) Running through the park', 'B) The dog ran through the park', 'C) While running through the park', 'D) Running and jumping'), 'B', 'Grammar' FROM diagnosticAssessments WHERE title = 'RLA Diagnostic Assessment' UNION ALL SELECT id, 'What is the main idea of the passage?', JSON_ARRAY('A) The history of technology', 'B) How smartphones changed communication', 'C) The future of the internet', 'D) Different types of phones'), 'B', 'Reading Comprehension' FROM diagnosticAssessments WHERE title = 'RLA Diagnostic Assessment' UNION ALL SELECT id, 'Which word is spelled correctly?', JSON_ARRAY('A) Occassion', 'B) Occassion', 'C) Occasion', 'D) Ocassion'), 'C', 'Spelling' FROM diagnosticAssessments WHERE title = 'RLA Diagnostic Assessment' UNION ALL SELECT id, 'Choose the sentence with correct punctuation', JSON_ARRAY('A) She said, "I will be there soon."', 'B) She said "I will be there soon".', 'C) She said, "I will be there soon.', 'D) She said I will be there soon.'), 'A', 'Punctuation' FROM diagnosticAssessments WHERE title = 'RLA Diagnostic Assessment';
